title: Section 5
content: (1) For the purposes of this Act, the 1[State Government] shall form districts and sub-districts, and shall prescribe, and may alter, the limits of such districts and sub-districts. (2) The districts and sub-districts formed under this section, together with the limits thereof, and every alternation of such limits, shall be notified in the 2[Official Gazette]. (3) Every such alternation shall take effect on such day after the date of the notification as is therein mentioned
footnote: 1. Subs. by the A.O. 1950, for "Provincial Government". 2. Subs. by the A.O. 1937, for "Local Official Gazette"
